sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ADELHEID ([1268]-7 Dec 1315, bur Vessra).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ADELHEID von Hessen, daughter of HEINRICH I "das Kind" Landgraf Herr von Hessen & his wife his first wife Adelheid von Braunschweig ([1268]-7 Dec 1315, bur Vessra).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Hessen於1272年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟時，她的父親Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen28歲，母親Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg27歲。她於1288年與Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年12月7日享年45歲，埋葬在德國薩辛史洛希根可洛斯特 維斯拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Hessen于1272年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟时，她的父亲Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen28岁，母亲Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg27岁。她于1288年与Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年12月7日享年45岁，埋葬在德国薩辛史洛希根可洛斯特 維斯拉。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna.  Scandinavian Hjalmer.

habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (German Hessen), a region (present-day federal state) in Germany named with the German dative plural form of the name of its inhabitants, the Hessians. Compare Hess 1.

variants.name: Haessig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reiner.
habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse, from the adjectival form of its German name (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hesser
meanings: nickname for a chaser at a hunt, from an agent derivative of Middle High German hessen ‘to hound’.
habitational name for someone from Hesse (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hess
meanings: German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (see   Hessen   1).
South German: from a short form of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hesso, a derivative of a compound name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as the first element, or from a pet form of Herman or Hendrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Hessen was born in 1272, in Hesse, Holy Roman Empire, her father, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, was 28 and her mother, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 27. She married Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII in 1288. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1317, at the age of 45, and was buried in Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Hessen est née en 1272, à Hessen, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII en 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1317, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Hessen 1272 in Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen 28 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 27. Sie hat 1288 Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1317 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Hessen è nata il nel 1272 nel Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, sua padre, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII nel 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1317, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Hessenが1272年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセンで生まれた時，父Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessenは28歳，母Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburgは27歳であった。1288年にGraf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年12月7日に45歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンスチレウシンジェンクロスター ベssラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Hessen(이)가 1272년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1288년 Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 12월 7일 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 슐레우징 클로스터 브ss라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Hessen nasceu em 1272, em Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII em 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1317, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Hessen родилась в 1272 г. в местности Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, её отцу по имени Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII в 1288 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1317 г. в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности клостир веssра, щлеусинген, сачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Hessen nació en 1272, en Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Graf Berthold Von Henneberg-Schleusingen VII en 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1317, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Kloster Veßra, Schleusingen, Sachsen, Alemania.
